3. Convert back to letter

(2) FF: F=5→6=G, F=5→6=G → "GG"
(3) DK: D=3→4=E, K=10→11=L → "EL"
(4) AF: A=0→1=B, F=5→6=G → "BG"
(5) KE: K=10→11=L, E=4→5=F → "LF"
(6) JD: J=9→10=K, D=3→4=E → "KE"
(7) AM: A=0→1=B, M=12→(13 mod 13)=0=A → "BA"
(8) CK: C=2→3=D, K=10→11=L → "DL"
(9) LJ: L=11→12=M, J=9→10=K → "MK"
